{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205521057DA2367F36508483274"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615869134447969049","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看.不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773212470,"group_id":"7607333931725098008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2hCP+z9nyRzvTapte/59Pc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/28065aef68074ac0992fb29854ff1a37~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703226&x-signature=Zziu3dZxcM1LJ3u1RrRaYjkY4vs%3D","user_id":"109664108343","user_name":"来世有钱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109664108343","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607333931725098008","book_info":{"abstract":"[空军钓鱼佬]，[直播]，[破案]
艾空均，江湖人称“空军司令”，直播宗旨：永不空军！结果……钓背包钓出诈骗犯，捞尸体发现谋杀案，钓青铜器成“国宝守护者”，夜钓撞破亿元洗钱团伙！弹幕疯刷：“均哥今天钓案子了吗？”“这直播间比警局KPI还高！”
别人钓鱼费饵，他钓鱼费警力——
钓到背包：包里有张和自己一模一样的身份证（弹幕：“双胞胎剧本？”）
钓到青铜器：文物局连夜打call：“战国一级文物，放下别动！”（榜一大哥狂喜：“这比刑侦剧刺激，充钱！”）
钓到浮尸：淡定报警：“大哥，这位置我打窝三天了……”（尸体：？？？）
当黑粉骂他剧本王，他当场钓出命案嫌疑人；当模仿者遇害他被网暴，直播间秒变“云破案指挥部”；当跨省追凶到洞庭湖，盗墓贼盗着盗着……直播间百万观众齐喊：“警察快抄定位！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3de0f6ccc96489d4bf84de239f40cad1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鸭梨味鸭梨","author_id":"","book_id":"7607333931725098008","book_name":"钓鱼佬绝不空军！！！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0c050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2589人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7607338214239502872","read_count":"2589","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"236617"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"67","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,破案,钓鱼,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3de0f6ccc96489d4bf84de239f40cad1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313930&x-signature=v46VoTygRr4synIZADtAW1n0l%2Bk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109560235172","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205521057DA2367F36508483274"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2839
